package rulecoverage

func PositiveStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoa() string {
    ruleID := "strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strconv.FormatInt(int64(v), 10)` instead of `strconv.Itoa(v)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
